task_description: Phase 41 FEAT-001: Create packages/quant-live skeleton with streaming ASR, VAD, turn-taking, session management, latency tracking, and comprehensive tests.

verification.summary: All 58 tests pass across 6 test files (513ms). TypeScript strict mode compilation clean. ESLint clean. Tests exercise real logic: state machine transitions, RMS-based VAD detection, percentile computation with sliding window, barge-in handling, ASR provider factory with WAV multipart format, batching/backpressure verification.

review_notes: v2 approved. 3 non-blocking notes for future: pipeline error propagation, buffer high-water mark, async stop/drain.
